title: Descriptive Statistics Memo
tagline: Calculate and interpret mean, median, mode, and standard deviation for a salary dataset.
scenario: An HR manager asks you to summarise the salary distribution for 200 employees. She does not want formulas — she wants to understand what the numbers mean for her hiring budget.
brief: Invent a plausible salary dataset (you may describe it rather than list 200 rows). Calculate the four descriptive statistics, then write a short memo interpreting them for a non-technical HR manager.
deliverables: The four statistics (mean, median, mode, standard deviation) with your calculations shown
A 150-word memo interpreting what these numbers tell the HR manager about salary distribution and equity
One visualization you would recommend to accompany the memo and why
submissionGuidance: If the mean is much higher than the median, that tells a story. Make sure your memo tells it.

rubric.label: Calculation Accuracy
rubric.description: Are the four statistics correctly calculated and internally consistent?

rubric.label: Interpretation
rubric.description: Does the memo explain what the numbers mean in business terms, not just math terms?

rubric.label: Visualization Choice
rubric.description: Is the recommended chart appropriate for showing distribution?
